title: 'Apple is entering 'the touchbar phase' again': MacBook OLED could be on track to launch in a few months, but skeptics still hate that rumored touchscreen
summary: Apple 's planning to launch a whole load of new Macs over the next couple of years, and if you were wondering about the MacBook OLED , seemingly this laptop remains on target for a possible launch later this year.
